title: Pre-drive review separates driven distance, tariff distance, toll evidence, and live status
purpose: Prevent the route UI from presenting actual distance as tariff distance or an unconfirmed traffic feed as proof that the route is open.

limitations: Scalar values are illustrative product-contract fixtures, not a current toll quote.

then.subject: route_summary.actual_distance_km
then.rationale: The planned drive distance remains its own review metric.

then.subject: route_summary.tariff_distance_km
then.rationale: Tariff distance cannot be derived from the user's repeated route occurrences.

then.subject: route_summary.toll.status
then.rationale: The displayed amount carries its evidence status.

then.subject: route_summary.passage.tone
then.rationale: No known planned conflict still does not prove live passage.

then.subject: route_summary.passage.uses_positive_open_color
then.rationale: The pre-drive review cannot visually imply a confirmed open road without live evidence.
